summary: This project uses pnpm, not npm. Install dependencies with `pnpm install`.
Run the unit test suite with `pnpm test`; CI runs it on every push.
Run end-to-end tests with `pnpm test:e2e`, which spins up Playwright.
Integration tests live under tests/integration and need a running database.
Use Python 3.11 for the backend; the repo fails on 3.9 due to new type-hint syntax.
Node.js version is pinned to 20 LTS via the .nvmrc file.
The frontend is built with React and Vite.
Frontend state is managed with Zustand, not Redux.
Styling uses Tailwind CSS; avoid inline styles except for dynamic values.
The component library is internal, named Aurora; do not add new external UI deps.
The mobile app is React Native and shares the API client package with the web app.
The backend API is FastAPI, served by uvicorn on port 8000.
A separate worker service runs background jobs using Celery and Redis.
Inter-service messages go through a RabbitMQ queue, not direct HTTP calls.
The primary database is PostgreSQL 16.
We use the pgvector extension on Postgres for storing embeddings.
Redis is used both as a cache and as the Celery broker.
We chose ChromaDB over FAISS for local prototyping because of easier metadata filters.
Database migrations are managed with Alembic; never edit the schema by hand.
The vector index is rebuilt nightly by a cron job in scripts/reindex.py.
Read replicas handle analytics queries; never run heavy reports on the primary DB.
Connection pooling uses PgBouncer in transaction mode.
Commit messages must follow Conventional Commits (feat:, fix:, chore:).
The main branch is protected; open a PR and get at least one approval to merge.
We squash-merge PRs so the main history stays linear.
Release tags follow semantic versioning, e.g. v2.4.1.
Code style is enforced by ruff and black; run `make lint` before pushing.
TypeScript code is linted with ESLint and formatted by Prettier.
Type checking is mandatory: mypy for Python, tsc --noEmit for the frontend.
All timestamps are stored in UTC; convert to local time only in the UI layer.
Logging uses a structured JSON format; use the `log` helper instead of print.
Feature work happens on short-lived branches named feature/<ticket-id>.
Secrets live in a .env file which is gitignored; never commit real API keys.
Production secrets are stored in HashiCorp Vault, not in environment files.
API authentication uses JWT bearer tokens with a 24 hour expiry.
Refresh tokens are rotated on every use and stored hashed in the database.
Role-based access control has three roles: viewer, editor, and admin.
All external inputs are validated with Pydantic models on the server side.
Rate limiting is 100 requests per minute per API key.
CORS allows only the official web and mobile origins; wildcard origins are forbidden.
We deploy to production on Fly.io using `fly deploy`.
Staging is a separate Fly.io app with its own database.
CI/CD runs on GitHub Actions; the deploy workflow triggers on tags only.
We use feature flags via LaunchDarkly for gradual rollouts.
Blue-green deployment is used for the API to avoid downtime.
Rollbacks are done by re-deploying the previous release tag.
Container images are built with Docker and pushed to GitHub Container Registry.
Image uploads go to S3; maximum size is 10MB, validated on the server side.
Generated thumbnails are cached on a CDN with a 30 day TTL.
Large file exports are streamed, never loaded fully into memory.
Performance budget: API p95 latency must stay under 300ms.
Frontend bundle size must stay under 250KB gzipped for the initial load.
We measure Core Web Vitals; LCP target is under 2.5 seconds.
The RAG chunking strategy is 512 tokens per chunk with 64 token overlap.
Embeddings use the multilingual MiniLM model to support Chinese and English data.
Retrieval uses top-k of 5 by default, tunable per query.
We rerank retrieved chunks with a cross-encoder before sending to the LLM.
The LLM gateway is LiteLLM, which lets us swap providers without code changes.
Prompts are stored as versioned templates in the prompts/ directory.
The design lead is Mei; ping her before changing the component library.
The backend on-call rotation is weekly; the schedule is in PagerDuty.
Code owners for the payments module are Jorge and Aisha.
New hires should read docs/onboarding.md in their first week.
Architecture decisions are recorded as ADRs under docs/adr/.
Onboarding docs are in docs/onboarding.md; update them when user flows change.
API reference docs are auto-generated from OpenAPI and published to the docs site.
Incident postmortems are blameless and stored in docs/postmortems/.
Error tracking uses Sentry; every release is tagged so errors map to a version.
Metrics are exported to Prometheus and visualized in Grafana dashboards.
Distributed traces use OpenTelemetry with the collector running as a sidecar.
Health checks live at /healthz and are polled by the load balancer every 10 seconds.
Database backups run every 6 hours and are retained for 30 days.
We test backup restores quarterly in the staging environment.
Cron jobs are defined in infra/cron.yaml, not scattered across services.
Infrastructure is provisioned with Terraform; manual console changes are forbidden.
Email is sent through Postmark; templates are managed in their dashboard.
Payments are processed by Stripe; webhook signatures must be verified.
Push notifications go through Firebase Cloud Messaging.
Search is powered by a managed Elasticsearch cluster, separate from Postgres.
Analytics events are sent to a separate pipeline and never block the request path.
我們的文件一律用繁體中文撰寫，程式碼註解可以用英文。
部署前必須先在 staging 環境跑過 smoke test 才能上線。
資料庫 migration 一律用 alembic 管理，不要手動修改 schema。
週會固定在每週二早上十點，開會前要更新 PROGRESS.md。
正式環境的金鑰存放在 Vault，嚴禁寫死在程式碼或設定檔裡。
前端送 API 之前要先做表單驗證，後端仍會再驗一次，不可只信任前端。
重大架構決策都要寫成 ADR 文件，存在 docs/adr 目錄下供日後查閱。
客服回報的問題統一開 issue 並標上 priority 標籤，由值班工程師分流。
圖片上傳大小上限是 10MB，超過要在前端先壓縮再送出。
新功能預設關閉，透過 feature flag 逐步開放給少數使用者測試。
程式碼風格交給 ruff 與 black 自動處理，送 PR 前請先跑過 make lint。
所有時間一律以 UTC 儲存，只有在畫面顯示時才轉成使用者當地時區。
API 回應時間 p95 必須低於 300 毫秒，超標要進效能調校流程。
資料庫每六小時自動備份一次，備份保留三十天。
錯誤監控用 Sentry，每次發版都打 tag，方便把錯誤對應到版本。
正式機部署採用藍綠部署，確保切換時不中斷服務。
登入採用 JWT，token 有效期 24 小時，過期需用 refresh token 換新。
主分支受保護，必須開 PR 並至少一人核可才能合併。
後端值班輪值以週為單位，輪值表放在 PagerDuty 上。
搜尋功能由獨立的 Elasticsearch 叢集提供，不要直接用資料庫做全文搜尋。
